subject: Two armored figures in a swampy forest location — one crouched repairing something at a basin, one standing guard holding a blade — with a small creature in the foreground
description: Two humanoid figures occupy a dim green-lit forest or swamp setting. On the left, a figure leans over a large basin or bowl filled with luminous blue-white water, face down in a maintenance or repair gesture. On the right, an upright figure with vivid red hair stands alert, wearing gold-and-green plate armor and holding a short blade at ready. In the foreground sits a small snake-like creature with a colorful pink plume or crest. Behind them, a massive organic structure — possibly a vehicle or creature shell — looms. The overall mood is tense but collaborative.
foreground: armored duo — one crouched over a glowing basin, one standing guard with blade — small plumed creature in foreground
background: dark swamp forest, organic large structure, murky greens
